prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.2 kg; Height 162.2 cm; BMI 20.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 202mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 195mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 180mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.1kg; 9 months ago 54.2kg; 6 months ago 56.2kg; 3 months ago 52.8kg; current 54.2kg), Height (12 months ago 162.2cm; 9 months ago 162.2cm; 6 months ago 162.2cm; 3 months ago 162.2cm; current 162.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 103U/L; 6 months ago 109U/L; 3 months ago 103U/L; current 103U/L), AST (12 months ago 83U/L; 9 months ago 85U/L; 6 months ago 76U/L; 3 months ago 76U/L; current 78U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; current 50mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 181mg/g; 9 months ago 260mg/g; 6 months ago 267mg/g; 3 months ago 210mg/g; current 285mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 179mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 162mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.1g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.61 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
